title: Webinar by Dr. Meenakshi Devi
content: Sep, 08 2023 at 12:15 pm Webinar by Dr. Meenakshi Devi Dr. Meenakshi Devi is currently working as a Senior Lecturer (Mathematics) in the Department of Mathematical Sciences, Sol Plaatje University (SPU), South Africa. Prior to joining SPU, she worked as a postdoctoral fellow at the University of KwaZulu-Natal, South Africa. She also worked as an Assistant Professor and Head of the Department of Mathematics at Bahra University. She earned her Ph. D. in Mathematics from JUIT in November 2014. She is the author of several research papers published in various journals/conferences. Her research area includes algebraic coding theory, information theory and error-correcting codes. <
